name: Toyo Drilube Co., Ltd.
summary: Toyo Drilube Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, coating processing, and sale of solid film lubricants and function film coating agents in Japan and internationally. Its solid film lubricants are formulated with solid lubricants, such as molybdenum disulfide, fluorine resin, or graphite; and dispersed in binders. The company offers its products under the DRILUBE brand name. Its products have applications in the fields of automotive equipment, electric home appliances, optical instruments, and technology. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
